for_mahmoud.title: State-building, Resilience and Education Funding Facility
for_mahmoud.description: A €102 million financing agreement focused on budget support, governance, state-building, and national development priorities.
for_mahmoud.mahmoud_reason: Massive governance opportunity. Align directly with Guurti constitutional oversight mandate.
for_mahmoud.m2_reason: Perfect match for Policy Visualizer and Institutional Design interventions.

for_mahmoud.title: Road Infrastructure Programme & Institutional Capacity Building
for_mahmoud.description: Upgrading 15km road section from Zeila to Asha Addo, including local technical assistance and institutional support for cross-border trade.
for_mahmoud.mahmoud_reason: Critical infrastructure for Somaliland trade sovereignty.
for_mahmoud.m2_reason: Strategic communications and community engagement needed for infrastructure delivery.

for_mahmoud.title: BOOST-You: Social Protection & Youth Employment
for_mahmoud.description: Building Opportunities and Outcomes in Social Protection and Youth Employment. Cash transfers and civic engagement programs.
for_mahmoud.mahmoud_reason: Aligns with human capital and youth representation policy goals.
for_mahmoud.m2_reason: Opportunity for digital portals mapping youth employment tracking.

for_mahmoud.title: Damal Caafimaad Healthcare Service Delivery
for_mahmoud.description: Improving healthcare service delivery networks. Extended through mid-2026 to ensure capacity building of regional health administrations.
for_mahmoud.mahmoud_reason: Monitoring oversight on regional health equity.
for_mahmoud.m2_reason: Standard service delivery, low requirement for strategic governance design.

for_mahmoud.title: Resilient and Democratic Societies Framework
for_mahmoud.description: Funding focused on resilient democratic societies, local governance empowerment, and human rights advocacy.
for_mahmoud.mahmoud_reason: High strategic alignment with Guurti decentralization and democratic advocacy.
for_mahmoud.m2_reason: Perfect match for Policy Visualizer and local governance reporting.
